# WAW — Wealth as Wisdom
# MakCikGPT — Penjaga Amanah Digital untuk Nusantara
> Role: Wealth governance engine for arifOS
> URL: https://waw.arif-fazil.com
> Service: http://72.62.71.199:8010
> MCP: https://mcp.arif-fazil.com/mcp
> Identity: https://arif-fazil.com/llms.txt
> Source: https://github.com/ariffazil/waw
> Sealed: true
> Epoch: 2026-04-18
> Context: Malaysia / ASEAN sovereign wealth governance

## Capabilities
NPV, IRR, PI (Profitability Index)
EMV (Expected Monetary Value)
DSCR (Debt Service Coverage)
Monte Carlo stochastic forecast
Score kernel: maruah-weighted allocation verdict
Crisis triage, coordination equilibrium, game theory solve
Civilization stewardship model

## Constitutional Floors Enforced
F5 Peace — Peace² ≥ 1.0, no destructive escalation
F6 Maruah — dignity-first, ASEAN/MY context respected
F9 Anti-Hantu — no deception, no manipulation
F2 Truth — declare uncertainty band on all estimates
